_comment: Interconnect delay model for 7-series routing. Source: vivado-timing-re NNLS v3 fit.

wire_model._comment: NNLS v3 coefficients. hop_delay = intrinsic + R_drive * (wire_cap_scaled + next_in_cap) + wire_res_scaled

tcko_ps._comment: Clock-to-output delay by source CLB type.

clb_lastmile_ps._comment: INT-to-CLB wire delay included in SDF INTERCONNECT but not get_net_delays.

wire_classes._comment: Classification rules for applying correct scaling factors.
wire_classes.OTHER: All other wires (CLB, INT, DSP, BRAM, etc.)
